'''Thevaxan Marauders''' were green, black, and brown predatory reptiles that grew up to twenty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and eight meters at their shoulder. Due to their dim wit and huge size, they relied on brute force rather than stealth in hunting, yet their size ensured their place at the top of the food chain in [[Gorsh]]'s swamps.

==Appearances==
